title: GitHub - cdiggins/plato: A simple and efficient cross-platform programming language.
excerpt: A simple and efficient cross-platform programming language. - cdiggins/plato
content_html:
Write geometry once. Run it everywhere.

Plato is a small, pure, statically-typed language for writing geometric and numeric libraries once, and compiling them into fast, idiomatic code for other platforms. The C# backend is in daily production use — it generates the geometry library consumed by the Ara 3D SDK — and the TypeScript and Rust backends are working proofs of concept, each with a browser demo you can try right now.

▶ Try the live demos

Twelve geometry algorithms — Delaunay triangulation, convex hulls, BVHs, half-edge meshes, raycasting, and more — written once in Plato and running in your browser two different ways, from the same source file:

  • TypeScript sample browser — Plato compiled to TypeScript, rendered with Three.js.
  • Rust sample browser — the same Plato source compiled to Rust, built to WebAssembly, computing every sample live in the browser.

Both pass the same conformance suite: identical algorithms, identical seeds, identical results. To run them locally, see Demos below.

What it is

Plato looks like a typed scripting language and compiles like a systems language. Everything is an immutable value, every function is pure, and a compiler amplifies terse declarations into a large, monomorphized, zero-dispatch library: the entire Plato standard library is ~3,500 lines of source, which becomes over 11,000 lines of C#. A three-field vector type comes out the other side as a struct with ~340 members.

What that buys you:

  • One source of truth. Your math library exists once. Every port is generated, so the ports can't drift.
  • Native-feeling output. C# gets packed structs and aggressive inlining; TypeScript gets fluent methods on plain numbers; Rust gets extension traits. Each target reads like it was written by hand, by someone who likes that language.
  • Performance by construction. Interface-generic code is monomorphized into direct calls — no boxing, no virtual dispatch, no runtime abstraction penalty.
  • Correctness by construction. Distinct types for Angle vs. Number and Point vs. Vector turn geometry's classic bugs into compile errors; purity makes every function a trivial unit-test target.

A taste of it

This is real code from the standard library — a circle, defined as data plus functions:

type Circle
    implements IAngularCurve2D, IClosedCurve2D
{
    Center: Point2D;
    Radius: Number;
}

library AngularCurves2D
{
    UnitCircle(t: Angle): Point2D
        => (t.Cos, t.Sin);

    Circle(t: Angle, center: Point2D, radius: Number): Point2D
        => t.UnitCircle * radius + center;

    Eval(curve: Circle, t: Angle): Point2D
        => t.Circle(curve.Center, curve.Radius);
}

From those few lines, Circle gets a constructor, tuple conversions, deconstruction, equality, hashing, ToString, and immutable WithCenter/WithRadius setters — and because it implements ICurve2D, it can be sampled, converted to a polyline, and composed with everything else written against curves, none of which was written for Circle specifically.

Note the types doing quiet work: Angle is not Number (trig functions exist only on angles, so degree/radian confusion is impossible), and Point2D is not Vector2 (subtracting two points yields a vector). These distinctions catch the bug classes geometry code actually has.

The whole language is three constructs

type — pure data. Fields only: no methods, no visibility modifiers, no inheritance.

interface — abstract data types with a Self type. These are type classes, not OO interfaces: they compile to constrained generics and concrete struct members, never boxing or virtual dispatch.

library — free functions, callable with dot syntax on their first argument. A function with no arguments is invoked like a property.

Write a function once against an interface, and every implementing type gets it:

Lerp(a: IVectorLike, b: IVectorLike, t: Number): IVectorLike
    => a.ZipComponents(b, (a1, b1) => a1.Lerp(b1, t));

Vectors, points, colors, angles, sizes — anything vector-like — now interpolates, with the code stamped directly into each type. Interfaces in a signature become inferred generic constraints; when you need finer control (parameters that may differ in type), explicit type variables are available:

Zip(xs: IArray<$T1>, ys: IArray<$T2>, f: Function2<$T1, $T2, $T3>): IArray<$T3>;

A handful of conveniences carry a lot of weight:

  • Tuples construct any type structurally: (t.Cos, t.Sin) builds a Point2D.
  • A function named after a type defines a conversion, and an implicit cast: Point3D(v: Vector3): Point3D => ...
  • Operators come from well-known function names: define Add, get +.
  • Array literals: [x.A, x.B, x.C].

What the compiler produces

The C# backend emits value types built for performance and interop:

[StructLayout(LayoutKind.Sequential, Pack = 1)]
public partial struct Vector3 : IVector<Vector3>
{
    [MethodImpl(AggressiveInlining)]
    public static implicit operator Vector3((Number, Number, Number) value) => ...
    [MethodImpl(AggressiveInlining)]
    public Vector3 Lerp(Vector3 b, Number t) => ...
    // ~340 public members, generated from a 3-field declaration
}

Interface-generic functions are monomorphized into direct, aggressively-inlined members — Rust's compilation model on .NET. Structs have deterministic memory layout, are declared partial so handwritten code can extend them, and interoperate with System.Numerics (which the core vector and matrix types wrap, SIMD included). Performance is comparable to well-written C#, and a Plato-level optimizer is planned to close the remaining gaps.

Why Plato

Plato is developed at Ara 3D. We do computational geometry across many languages and platforms, and rewriting the same high-performance math library for each one — then keeping the copies in sync — was too costly for a small company. No existing language offered the right mix of simplicity, abstraction, and performance, so we built one: a single source of truth for geometry, with deterministic translation to wherever it needs to run.

The restrictions are the point. No mutation, no this, no visibility rules, no virtual dispatch, no exceptions, no reflection. Every removal is what makes retargeting credible — most transpilers die on "which subset of the source language actually ports," and Plato never admits the unportable constructs in the first place. The same restrictions make every function trivially testable and safe to parallelize.

Where it shines, and where it doesn't

Plato is built for pure computational kernels over small value types: vector and matrix algebra, parametric curves and surfaces, signed distance fields, bounds and intervals, color spaces, transforms, meshes, procedural generation. The standard library in plato-src reads remarkably close to the math it implements — curve definitions are one line from the textbook formulas they cite.

It is deliberately not a general-purpose language. There are no strings to speak of, no I/O, no mutation, no application state. Stateful systems, UI, protocols, and algorithms that are naturally imperative belong in the host language; Plato is the layer the host calls into.

Where it comes from

Plato synthesizes ideas with long pedigrees: type classes (Haskell, Swift protocols, Rust traits), uniform function call syntax (D, Nim), the uniform access principle (Eiffel), and the ergonomics of shader languages (swizzles, Lerp, component-wise everything). The design got some outside validation when .NET 7's generic math (INumber<TSelf>) independently converged on the same self-constrained generic interfaces Plato compiles to. Its closest spiritual relatives are domain-owning DSLs like Halide, Futhark, and Slang: write a domain's code once, in a restricted pure language, and compile it into whatever host needs it.

Plato and AI-assisted development

Plato was designed before coding agents were the norm, but its architecture is almost exactly what you would design for them.

It fits in a context window. The complete language and standard library is ~34K tokens. The generated C# is ~236K — for one target. An agent working on Plato source holds the entire semantic surface of the library in context at once: no retrieval, no partial views, no hallucinated APIs. Almost no production library in any mainstream language has this property.

Maximum intent per token. One declaration fans out into hundreds of concrete members across every implementing type and, eventually, every target. The alternative — "apply this change consistently across 160 files" — is the canonical agent failure mode. Plato turns the hardest agent task (global consistency) into the easiest one (edit one line; determinism does the rest).

It verifies well. Agentic coding is a generate–check–repair loop, and pure functions over immutable values are the ideal substrate: every function is a unit-test target, properties are easy to state, and evaluation is deterministic. And since the source is compact, formula-shaped, and cites its references inline, it doubles as its own documentation — the most token-economical format there is.

As agents write more of the world's code, the premium shifts from languages that are easy to write toward languages that are dense to read, cheap to verify, and safe to regenerate from. That is the niche Plato occupies.

Compiler pipeline

A .plato file becomes generated code through a series of intermediate representations, each produced by a single pass. The full internals guide is docs/compiler-pipeline.md; the shape is:

source → AST → Symbol graph → Normalize → Constrain → Solve → ⟨elaborate → monomorphize → emit⟩
  • AST (Plato.AST) — syntax with source spans. Operators, member access (a.b), UFCS (a.b(c)), and indexers are already lowered here: a + b is Add(a, b), a.Magnitude is a receiver-first call.
  • Symbol graph (PlatoCompiler/Symbols) — names resolved to definitions, scopes established, nominal TypeExpressions in place. Calls still point at whole overload groups; expression types are not yet resolved.
  • Normalize (PlatoCompiler/Checking/Normalizer) — canonicalizes the symbol graph for the checker (strips residual parentheses, eta-expands first-class function references into lambdas) and guarantees a small set of invariants. Behavior-preserving and idempotent.
  • Constrain (…/ConstraintGenerator) — bidirectional walk that assigns a type variable to every expression and emits equality and overload constraints.
  • Solve (…/Solver) — nominal unification with an occurs check and deferred-commitment overload resolution. It is total: a clash, no-match, or ambiguity becomes a located diagnostic that points at the offending expression, instead of surfacing later as an error in generated C#.

The last three passes are new and currently run in shadow mode — they compute a fully-typed, diagnosed view of every function but do not yet feed code generation, so the production emitter's byte-for-byte output is unchanged. The solver already does exact/generic unification, concept (interface) satisfaction with Self-style return refinement, implicit casts, and generic-concept element inference; the elaboration that lets the backends consume a fully-typed IR is the next increment.

Status

The language design is stabilizing after a few years of iteration. The Plato-to-C# compiler is in daily production use: it generates the geometry library consumed by the Ara 3D SDK (ara3d-sdk/src/Plato.Generated when built inside the Ara 3D studio monorepo). Honest caveats:

  • The C# backend is production; the TypeScript and Rust backends are working proofs of concept — they compile a curated demo library and pass a shared conformance suite (see the live demos), but haven't consumed the full standard library yet.
  • The compiler builds standalone in this repository; the studio monorepo consumes it via submodules/Plato.
  • Type errors still ultimately surface through the C# compiler against generated code, but a native type-checker front-end (normalize → constrain → solve, with located diagnostics) now runs in shadow mode over the standard library; wiring it into the pipeline is in progress. See docs/compiler-pipeline.md.
  • A visual data-flow syntax (PlatoFlow) is under development.

The compiler is open source and was built alongside the Parakeet parsing library.

Demos

The multi-target geometry sample browsers are live on GitHub Pages (TypeScript · Rust + WASM), deployed automatically by .github/workflows/pages.yml.

The source lives in demos/: one shared geometry.plato, a TypeScript + Three.js sample browser, and a Rust crate with a WebAssembly demo. To run them locally (Node 20+ is the only requirement — the WASM module is checked in, so the Rust demo doesn't even need a Rust toolchain):

:: TypeScript sample browser — http://localhost:5173
cd demos/typescript/geometry-samples
npm install
npm run dev

:: Rust + WASM sample browser — http://localhost:8873
cd demos/rust/geometry-samples
node web/serve.mjs

See demos/README.md for tests, regeneration from Plato source, and how to add a sample.

Contributing

Good projects for motivated and patient people:

  • Property-based tests for the standard library
  • Plato-to-Plato optimizers (e.g., compile-time unrolling of component-wise operations)
  • Growing the TypeScript and Rust backends from proof of concept to the full standard library
  • New backends: GLSL, C++, Dart, Java, Go
  • Editor support: LSP, VS Code, Visual Studio

Feedback

Always welcome, in any form. Find me on LinkedIn or at cdiggins@gmail.com.

sentences.zh: 每个端口都是生成的，因此端口不能漂移。

blocks.html_en: • Native-feeling output. C# gets packed structs and aggressive inlining; TypeScript gets fluent methods on plain numbers; Rust gets extension traits. Each target reads like it was written by hand, by someone who likes that language.

sentences.en: Native-feeling output.
sentences.zh: 原生感觉的输出。

sentences.en: C# gets packed structs and aggressive inlining; TypeScript gets fluent methods on plain numbers; Rust gets extension traits.
sentences.zh: C# 具有打包结构和积极的内联； TypeScript 在普通数字上获得流畅的方法； Rust 获得了扩展特征。

sentences.en: Each target reads like it was written by hand, by someone who likes that language.
sentences.zh: 每个目标读起来就像是由喜欢该语言的人手写的。

blocks.html_en: • Performance by construction. Interface-generic code is monomorphized into direct calls — no boxing, no virtual dispatch, no runtime abstraction penalty.

sentences.en: Performance by construction.
sentences.zh: 通过施工表现。

sentences.en: Interface-generic code is monomorphized into direct calls — no boxing, no virtual dispatch, no runtime abstraction penalty.
sentences.zh: 接口通用代码被单态化为直接调用——没有装箱，没有虚拟调度，没有运行时抽象惩罚。

blocks.html_en: • Correctness by construction. Distinct types for Angle vs. Number and Point vs. Vector turn geometry's classic bugs into compile errors; purity makes every function a trivial unit-test target.

sentences.en: Correctness by construction.
sentences.zh: 构造的正确性。

sentences.en: Distinct types for Angle vs. Number and Point vs. Vector turn geometry's classic bugs into compile errors; purity makes every function a trivial unit-test target.
sentences.zh: 角度与数字和点与矢量的不同类型将几何的经典错误转化为编译错误；纯度使每个函数都成为微不足道的单元测试目标。

blocks.html_en: A taste of it

sentences.en: A taste of it
sentences.zh: 尝尝它的味道

blocks.html_en: This is real code from the standard library — a circle, defined as data plus functions:

sentences.en: This is real code from the standard library — a circle, defined as data plus functions:
sentences.zh: 这是来自标准库的真实代码——一个圆圈，定义为数据加函数：

blocks.html_en: From those few lines, Circle gets a constructor, tuple conversions, deconstruction, equality, hashing, ToString, and immutable WithCenter/WithRadius setters — and because it implements ICurve2D, it can be sampled, converted to a polyline, and composed with everything else written against curves, none of which was written for Circle specifically.

sentences.en: From those few lines, Circle gets a constructor, tuple conversions, deconstruction, equality, hashing, ToString, and immutable WithCenter/WithRadius setters — and because it implements ICurve2D, it can be sampled, converted to a polyline, and composed with everything else written against curves, none of which was written for Circle specifically.
sentences.zh: 从这几行代码中，Circle 获得了一个构造函数、元组转换、解构、相等、散列、ToString 和不可变的 WithCenter/WithRadius 设置器 - 并且因为它实现了 ICurve2D，所以它可以被采样、转换为折线，并与针对曲线编写的其他所有内容组成，其中没有一个是专门为 Circle 编写的。

blocks.html_en: Note the types doing quiet work: Angle is not Number (trig functions exist only on angles, so degree/radian confusion is impossible), and Point2D is not Vector2 (subtracting two points yields a vector). These distinctions catch the bug classes geometry code actually has.

sentences.en: Note the types doing quiet work: Angle is not Number (trig functions exist only on angles, so degree/radian confusion is impossible), and Point2D is not Vector2 (subtracting two points yields a vector).
sentences.zh: 请注意安静工作的类型：Angle 不是 Number（三角函数仅存在于角度上，因此角度/弧度混淆是不可能的），Point2D 不是 Vector2（两个点相减得到一个向量）。

sentences.en: These distinctions catch the bug classes geometry code actually has.
sentences.zh: 这些区别捕获了几何代码实际存在的错误类。

blocks.html_en: The whole language is three constructs

sentences.en: The whole language is three constructs
sentences.zh: 整个语言由三个结构组成

blocks.html_en: type — pure data. Fields only: no methods, no visibility modifiers, no inheritance.

sentences.en: type — pure data.
sentences.zh: 类型——纯数据。

sentences.en: Fields only: no methods, no visibility modifiers, no inheritance.
sentences.zh: 仅字段：没有方法，没有可见性修饰符，没有继承。

blocks.html_en: interface — abstract data types with a Self type. These are type classes, not OO interfaces: they compile to constrained generics and concrete struct members, never boxing or virtual dispatch.

sentences.en: interface — abstract data types with a Self type.
sentences.zh: 接口 — 具有 Self 类型的抽象数据类型。

sentences.en: These are type classes, not OO interfaces: they compile to constrained generics and concrete struct members, never boxing or virtual dispatch.
sentences.zh: 这些是类型类，而不是 OO 接口：它们编译为受约束的泛型和具体结构成员，从不装箱或虚拟分派。

blocks.html_en: library — free functions, callable with dot syntax on their first argument. A function with no arguments is invoked like a property.

sentences.en: library — free functions, callable with dot syntax on their first argument.
sentences.zh: 库 - 自由函数，可以在第一个参数上使用点语法进行调用。

sentences.en: A function with no arguments is invoked like a property.
sentences.zh: 不带参数的函数像属性一样被调用。

blocks.html_en: Write a function once against an interface, and every implementing type gets it:

sentences.en: Write a function once against an interface, and every implementing type gets it:
sentences.zh: 针对接口编写一次函数，每个实现类型都会获取它：

blocks.html_en: Vectors, points, colors, angles, sizes — anything vector-like — now interpolates, with the code stamped directly into each type. Interfaces in a signature become inferred generic constraints; when you need finer control (parameters that may differ in type), explicit type variables are available:

sentences.en: Vectors, points, colors, angles, sizes — anything vector-like — now interpolates, with the code stamped directly into each type.
sentences.zh: 向量、点、颜色、角度、大小——任何类似向量的东西——现在都可以进行插值，代码直接标记到每种类型中。

sentences.en: Interfaces in a signature become inferred generic constraints; when you need finer control (parameters that may differ in type), explicit type variables are available:
sentences.zh: 签名中的接口成为推断的通用约束；当您需要更精细的控制（类型可能不同的参数）时，可以使用显式类型变量：

blocks.html_en: A handful of conveniences carry a lot of weight:

sentences.en: A handful of conveniences carry a lot of weight:
sentences.zh: 一些便利设施很重要：

blocks.html_en: • Tuples construct any type structurally: (t.Cos, t.Sin) builds a Point2D.

sentences.en: Tuples construct any type structurally: (t.Cos, t.Sin) builds a Point2D.
sentences.zh: 元组在结构上构造任何类型：(t.Cos, t.Sin) 构造一个 Point2D。

blocks.html_en: • A function named after a type defines a conversion, and an implicit cast: Point3D(v: Vector3): Point3D => ...

sentences.en: A function named after a type defines a conversion, and an implicit cast: Point3D(v: Vector3): Point3D => ...
sentences.zh: 以类型命名的函数定义转换和隐式转换： Point3D(v: Vector3): Point3D => ...

blocks.html_en: • Operators come from well-known function names: define Add, get +.

sentences.en: Operators come from well-known function names: define Add, get +.
sentences.zh: 运算符来自众所周知的函数名称：define Add、get +。

blocks.html_en: • Array literals: [x.A, x.B, x.C].

sentences.en: Array literals: [x.A, x.B, x.C].
sentences.zh: 数组字面量：[x.A, x.B, x.C]。

blocks.html_en: What the compiler produces

sentences.en: What the compiler produces
sentences.zh: 编译器产生什么

blocks.html_en: The C# backend emits value types built for performance and interop:

sentences.en: The C# backend emits value types built for performance and interop:
sentences.zh: C# 后端发出为性能和互操作而构建的值类型：

blocks.html_en: Interface-generic functions are monomorphized into direct, aggressively-inlined members — Rust's compilation model on .NET. Structs have deterministic memory layout, are declared partial so handwritten code can extend them, and interoperate with System.Numerics (which the core vector and matrix types wrap, SIMD included). Performance is comparable to well-written C#, and a Plato-level optimizer is planned to close the remaining gaps.

sentences.en: Interface-generic functions are monomorphized into direct, aggressively-inlined members — Rust's compilation model on .NET.
sentences.zh: 接口通用函数被单态化为直接的、积极内联的成员——.NET 上的 Rust 编译模型。

sentences.en: Structs have deterministic memory layout, are declared partial so handwritten code can extend them, and interoperate with System.Numerics (which the core vector and matrix types wrap, SIMD included).
sentences.zh: 结构具有确定性的内存布局，被声明为部分的，因此手写代码可以扩展它们，并与 System.Numerics（核心向量和矩阵类型包装，包括 SIMD）进行互操作。

sentences.en: Performance is comparable to well-written C#, and a Plato-level optimizer is planned to close the remaining gaps.
sentences.zh: 性能可与编写良好的 C# 相媲美，并且计划使用柏拉图级优化器来弥补剩余的差距。

blocks.html_en: Why Plato

sentences.en: Why Plato
sentences.zh: 为什么是柏拉图

blocks.html_en: Plato is developed at Ara 3D. We do computational geometry across many languages and platforms, and rewriting the same high-performance math library for each one — then keeping the copies in sync — was too costly for a small company. No existing language offered the right mix of simplicity, abstraction, and performance, so we built one: a single source of truth for geometry, with deterministic translation to wherever it needs to run.

sentences.en: Plato is developed at Ara 3D.
sentences.zh: Plato 是在 Ara 3D 开发的。

sentences.en: We do computational geometry across many languages and platforms, and rewriting the same high-performance math library for each one — then keeping the copies in sync — was too costly for a small company.
sentences.zh: 我们跨多种语言和平台进行计算几何，并为每种语言和平台重写相同的高性能数学库 - 然后保持副本同步 - 对于小公司来说成本太高。

sentences.en: No existing language offered the right mix of simplicity, abstraction, and performance, so we built one: a single source of truth for geometry, with deterministic translation to wherever it needs to run.
sentences.zh: 现有的语言没有提供简单性、抽象性和性能的正确组合，因此我们构建了一种语言：几何学的单一事实来源，可以确定性地翻译到需要运行的任何地方。

blocks.html_en: The restrictions are the point. No mutation, no this, no visibility rules, no virtual dispatch, no exceptions, no reflection. Every removal is what makes retargeting credible — most transpilers die on "which subset of the source language actually ports," and Plato never admits the unportable constructs in the first place. The same restrictions make every function trivially testable and safe to parallelize.

sentences.en: The restrictions are the point.
sentences.zh: 限制是重点。

sentences.en: No mutation, no this, no visibility rules, no virtual dispatch, no exceptions, no reflection.
sentences.zh: 没有变异，没有这个，没有可见性规则，没有虚拟调度，没有异常，没有反射。

sentences.en: Every removal is what makes retargeting credible — most transpilers die on "which subset of the source language actually ports," and Plato never admits the unportable constructs in the first place.
sentences.zh: 每一次删除都是使重定向变得可信的原因——大多数转译器都死于“源语言的哪个子集实际移植”，而柏拉图从一开始就从未承认不可移植的结构。

sentences.en: The same restrictions make every function trivially testable and safe to parallelize.
sentences.zh: 相同的限制使得每个函数都可以轻松测试并且可以安全地并行化。

blocks.html_en: Where it shines, and where it doesn't

sentences.en: Where it shines, and where it doesn't
sentences.zh: 哪里闪光，哪里不闪光

blocks.html_en: Plato is built for pure computational kernels over small value types: vector and matrix algebra, parametric curves and surfaces, signed distance fields, bounds and intervals, color spaces, transforms, meshes, procedural generation. The standard library in plato-src reads remarkably close to the math it implements — curve definitions are one line from the textbook formulas they cite.

sentences.en: Plato is built for pure computational kernels over small value types: vector and matrix algebra, parametric curves and surfaces, signed distance fields, bounds and intervals, color spaces, transforms, meshes, procedural generation.
sentences.zh: Plato 是为小值类型上的纯计算内核而构建的：向量和矩阵代数、参数曲线和曲面、有符号距离场、边界和间隔、颜色空间、变换、网格、程序生成。

sentences.en: The standard library in plato-src reads remarkably close to the math it implements — curve definitions are one line from the textbook formulas they cite.
sentences.zh: plato-src 中的标准库读起来非常接近它所实现的数学——曲线定义是他们引用的教科书公式中的一行。

blocks.html_en: It is deliberately not a general-purpose language. There are no strings to speak of, no I/O, no mutation, no application state. Stateful systems, UI, protocols, and algorithms that are naturally imperative belong in the host language; Plato is the layer the host calls into.

sentences.en: It is deliberately not a general-purpose language.
sentences.zh: 它故意不是一种通用语言。

sentences.en: There are no strings to speak of, no I/O, no mutation, no application state.
sentences.zh: 没有字符串可言，没有 I/O，没有突变，没有应用程序状态。

sentences.en: Stateful systems, UI, protocols, and algorithms that are naturally imperative belong in the host language; Plato is the layer the host calls into.
sentences.zh: 有状态的系统、UI、协议和算法自然是命令式的，属于宿主语言； Plato 是主机调用的层。

blocks.html_en: Where it comes from

sentences.en: Where it comes from
sentences.zh: 它来自哪里

blocks.html_en: Plato synthesizes ideas with long pedigrees: type classes (Haskell, Swift protocols, Rust traits), uniform function call syntax (D, Nim), the uniform access principle (Eiffel), and the ergonomics of shader languages (swizzles, Lerp, component-wise everything). The design got some outside validation when .NET 7's generic math (INumber<TSelf>) independently converged on the same self-constrained generic interfaces Plato compiles to. Its closest spiritual relatives are domain-owning DSLs like Halide, Futhark, and Slang: write a domain's code once, in a restricted pure language, and compile it into whatever host needs it.

sentences.en: Plato synthesizes ideas with long pedigrees: type classes (Haskell, Swift protocols, Rust traits), uniform function call syntax (D, Nim), the uniform access principle (Eiffel), and the ergonomics of shader languages (swizzles, Lerp, component-wise everything).
sentences.zh: Plato 综合了具有悠久历史的思想：类型类（Haskell、Swift 协议、Rust 特征）、统一函数调用语法（D、Nim）、统一访问原则（Eiffel）以及着色器语言的人体工程学（swizzles、Lerp、组件方面的一切）。

sentences.en: The design got some outside validation when .NET 7's generic math (INumber<TSelf>) independently converged on the same self-constrained generic interfaces Plato compiles to.
sentences.zh: 当 .NET 7 的通用数学 (INumber<TSelf>) 独立地收敛到 Plato 编译到的相同自我约束通用接口时，该设计得到了一些外部验证。

sentences.en: Its closest spiritual relatives are domain-owning DSLs like Halide, Futhark, and Slang: write a domain's code once, in a restricted pure language, and compile it into whatever host needs it.
sentences.zh: 它最接近的精神亲戚是拥有域的 DSL，例如 Halide、Futhark 和 Slang：用受限制的纯语言编写一次域的代码，然后将其编译成主机需要的任何内容。

blocks.html_en: Plato and AI-assisted development

sentences.en: Plato and AI-assisted development
sentences.zh: 柏拉图和人工智能辅助开发

blocks.html_en: Plato was designed before coding agents were the norm, but its architecture is almost exactly what you would design for them.

sentences.en: Plato was designed before coding agents were the norm, but its architecture is almost exactly what you would design for them.
sentences.zh: Plato 是在编码代理成为规范之前设计的，但它的架构几乎正是您为它们设计的。

blocks.html_en: It fits in a context window. The complete language and standard library is ~34K tokens. The generated C# is ~236K — for one target. An agent working on Plato source holds the entire semantic surface of the library in context at once: no retrieval, no partial views, no hallucinated APIs. Almost no production library in any mainstream language has this property.

sentences.en: It fits in a context window.
sentences.zh: 它适合上下文窗口。

sentences.en: The complete language and standard library is ~34K tokens.
sentences.zh: 完整的语言和标准库大约有 34K 个令牌。

sentences.en: The generated C# is ~236K — for one target.
sentences.zh: 对于一个目标，生成的 C# 约为 236K。

sentences.en: An agent working on Plato source holds the entire semantic surface of the library in context at once: no retrieval, no partial views, no hallucinated APIs.
sentences.zh: 在 Plato 源上工作的代理可以立即在上下文中保存库的整个语义表面：没有检索，没有部分视图，没有幻觉的 API。

sentences.en: Almost no production library in any mainstream language has this property.
sentences.zh: 任何主流语言中几乎没有生产库具有此属性。

blocks.html_en: Maximum intent per token. One declaration fans out into hundreds of concrete members across every implementing type and, eventually, every target. The alternative — "apply this change consistently across 160 files" — is the canonical agent failure mode. Plato turns the hardest agent task (global consistency) into the easiest one (edit one line; determinism does the rest).

sentences.en: Maximum intent per token.
sentences.zh: 每个令牌的最大意图。

sentences.en: One declaration fans out into hundreds of concrete members across every implementing type and, eventually, every target.
sentences.zh: 一份宣言会扩散到数百个具体成员中，涵盖每种实施类型，并最终涉及每个目标。

sentences.en: The alternative — "apply this change consistently across 160 files" — is the canonical agent failure mode.
sentences.zh: 另一种选择——“在 160 个文件中一致地应用此更改”——是典型的代理故障模式。

sentences.en: Plato turns the hardest agent task (global consistency) into the easiest one (edit one line; determinism does the rest).
sentences.zh: 柏拉图将最困难的代理任务（全局一致性）变成最简单的任务（编辑一行；决定论完成其余的任务）。

blocks.html_en: It verifies well. Agentic coding is a generate–check–repair loop, and pure functions over immutable values are the ideal substrate: every function is a unit-test target, properties are easy to state, and evaluation is deterministic. And since the source is compact, formula-shaped, and cites its references inline, it doubles as its own documentation — the most token-economical format there is.

sentences.en: It verifies well.
sentences.zh: 验证得很好。

sentences.en: Agentic coding is a generate–check–repair loop, and pure functions over immutable values are the ideal substrate: every function is a unit-test target, properties are easy to state, and evaluation is deterministic.
sentences.zh: 代理编码是一个生成-检查-修复循环，不可变值上的纯函数是理想的基础：每个函数都是单元测试目标，属性很容易陈述，并且评估是确定性的。

sentences.en: And since the source is compact, formula-shaped, and cites its references inline, it doubles as its own documentation — the most token-economical format there is.
sentences.zh: 而且由于源代码紧凑、公式化，并内嵌引用其参考文献，因此它还可以作为自己的文档——这是最经济的格式。

blocks.html_en: As agents write more of the world's code, the premium shifts from languages that are easy to write toward languages that are dense to read, cheap to verify, and safe to regenerate from. That is the niche Plato occupies.

sentences.en: As agents write more of the world's code, the premium shifts from languages that are easy to write toward languages that are dense to read, cheap to verify, and safe to regenerate from.
sentences.zh: 随着代理编写世界上越来越多的代码，溢价从易于编写的语言转向易于阅读、验证成本低廉且可安全重新生成的语言。

sentences.en: That is the niche Plato occupies.
sentences.zh: 这就是柏拉图所占据的利基。

blocks.html_en: Compiler pipeline

sentences.en: Compiler pipeline
sentences.zh: 编译器管道

blocks.html_en: A .plato file becomes generated code through a series of intermediate representations, each produced by a single pass. The full internals guide is docs/compiler-pipeline.md; the shape is:

sentences.en: A .plato file becomes generated code through a series of intermediate representations, each produced by a single pass.
sentences.zh: .plato 文件通过一系列中间表示变成生成的代码，每个中间表示都由单遍生成。

sentences.en: The full internals guide is docs/compiler-pipeline.md; the shape is:
sentences.zh: 完整的内部指南是 docs/compiler-pipeline.md；形状是：

blocks.html_en: • AST (Plato.AST) — syntax with source spans. Operators, member access (a.b), UFCS (a.b(c)), and indexers are already lowered here: a + b is Add(a, b), a.Magnitude is a receiver-first call.

sentences.en: AST (Plato.AST) — syntax with source spans.
sentences.zh: AST (Plato.AST) — 具有源跨度的语法。

sentences.en: Operators, member access (a.b), UFCS (a.b(c)), and indexers are already lowered here: a + b is Add(a, b), a.Magnitude is a receiver-first call.
sentences.zh: 运算符、成员访问 (a.b)、UFCS (a.b(c)) 和索引器已在此处降低：a + b 是 Add(a, b)，a.Magnitude 是接收者优先调用。

blocks.html_en: • Symbol graph (PlatoCompiler/Symbols) — names resolved to definitions, scopes established, nominal TypeExpressions in place. Calls still point at whole overload groups; expression types are not yet resolved.

sentences.en: Symbol graph (PlatoCompiler/Symbols) — names resolved to definitions, scopes established, nominal TypeExpressions in place.
sentences.zh: 符号图 (PlatoCompiler/Symbols) — 名称解析为定义、建立范围、到位的名义类型表达式。

sentences.en: Calls still point at whole overload groups; expression types are not yet resolved.
sentences.zh: 呼叫仍然指向整个过载组；表达式类型尚未解决。

blocks.html_en: • Normalize (PlatoCompiler/Checking/Normalizer) — canonicalizes the symbol graph for the checker (strips residual parentheses, eta-expands first-class function references into lambdas) and guarantees a small set of invariants. Behavior-preserving and idempotent.

sentences.en: Normalize (PlatoCompiler/Checking/Normalizer) — canonicalizes the symbol graph for the checker (strips residual parentheses, eta-expands first-class function references into lambdas) and guarantees a small set of invariants.
sentences.zh: Normalize (PlatoCompiler/Checking/Normalizer) — 规范化检查器的符号图（去除剩余括号，eta 将一等函数引用扩展为 lambda）并保证一小组不变量。

sentences.en: Behavior-preserving and idempotent.
sentences.zh: 行为保持和幂等。

blocks.html_en: • Constrain (…/ConstraintGenerator) — bidirectional walk that assigns a type variable to every expression and emits equality and overload constraints.

sentences.en: Constrain (…/ConstraintGenerator) — bidirectional walk that assigns a type variable to every expression and emits equality and overload constraints.
sentences.zh: Constrain (…/ConstraintGenerator) — 双向遍历，为每个表达式分配类型变量并发出相等和重载约束。

blocks.html_en: • Solve (…/Solver) — nominal unification with an occurs check and deferred-commitment overload resolution. It is total: a clash, no-match, or ambiguity becomes a located diagnostic that points at the offending expression, instead of surfacing later as an error in generated C#.

sentences.en: Solve (…/Solver) — nominal unification with an occurs check and deferred-commitment overload resolution.
sentences.zh: Solve (…/Solver) — 具有发生检查和延迟提交重载解析的名义统一。

sentences.en: It is total: a clash, no-match, or ambiguity becomes a located diagnostic that points at the offending expression, instead of surfacing later as an error in generated C#.
sentences.zh: 它是彻底的：冲突、不匹配或歧义成为指向有问题表达式的定位诊断，而不是稍后在生成的 C# 中作为错误出现。

blocks.html_en: The last three passes are new and currently run in shadow mode — they compute a fully-typed, diagnosed view of every function but do not yet feed code generation, so the production emitter's byte-for-byte output is unchanged. content_html_zh:
写一次几何。 到处运行它。

Plato 是一种小型、纯粹的静态类型语言，用于编写一次几何和数字库，并将它们编译成适用于其他平台的快速、惯用的代码。 C# 后端在日常生产中使用 - 它生成 Ara 3D SDK 使用的几何库 - TypeScript 和 Rust 后端是概念验证，每个后端都有一个浏览器演示，您可以立即尝试。

▶ 尝试现场演示

十二种几何算法 - Delaunay 三角剖分、凸包、BVH、半边网格、光线投射等 - 在 Plato 中编写一次，并通过同一源文件以两种不同的方式在浏览器中运行：

  • TypeScript 示例浏览器 - Plato 编译为 TypeScript，使用 Three.js 渲染。
  • Rust 示例浏览器 - 相同的 Plato 源代码编译为 Rust，构建为 WebAssembly，在浏览器中实时计算每个示例。

两者都通过相同的一致性套件：相同的算法、相同的种子、相同的结果。 要在本地运行它们，请参阅下面的演示。

它是什么

Plato 看起来像一种类型脚本语言，并且像系统语言一样编译。 一切都是不可变的值，每个函数都是纯的，编译器将简洁的声明放大为一个大型、单态化、零调度的库：整个 Plato 标准库大约有 3,500 行源代码，变成了超过 11,000 行 C#。 另一方面，三字段向量类型作为具有约 340 个成员的结构体出现。

这会给你带来什么：

  • 真理的来源之一。 你的数学库只存在一次。 每个端口都是生成的，因此端口不能漂移。
  • 原生感觉的输出。 C# 具有打包结构和积极的内联； TypeScript 在普通数字上获得流畅的方法； Rust 获得了扩展特征。 每个目标读起来就像是由喜欢该语言的人手写的。
  • 通过施工表现。 接口通用代码被单态化为直接调用——没有装箱，没有虚拟调度，没有运行时抽象惩罚。
  • 构造的正确性。 角度与数字和点与矢量的不同类型将几何的经典错误转化为编译错误；纯度使每个函数都成为微不足道的单元测试目标。

尝尝它的味道

这是来自标准库的真实代码——一个圆圈，定义为数据加函数：

type Circle
    implements IAngularCurve2D, IClosedCurve2D
{
    Center: Point2D;
    Radius: Number;
}

library AngularCurves2D
{
    UnitCircle(t: Angle): Point2D
        => (t.Cos, t.Sin);

    Circle(t: Angle, center: Point2D, radius: Number): Point2D
        => t.UnitCircle * radius + center;

    Eval(curve: Circle, t: Angle): Point2D
        => t.Circle(curve.Center, curve.Radius);
}

从这几行代码中，Circle 获得了一个构造函数、元组转换、解构、相等、散列、ToString 和不可变的 WithCenter/WithRadius 设置器 - 并且因为它实现了 ICurve2D，所以它可以被采样、转换为折线，并与针对曲线编写的其他所有内容组成，其中没有一个是专门为 Circle 编写的。

请注意安静工作的类型：Angle 不是 Number（三角函数仅存在于角度上，因此角度/弧度混淆是不可能的），Point2D 不是 Vector2（两个点相减得到一个向量）。 这些区别捕获了几何代码实际存在的错误类。

整个语言由三个结构组成

类型——纯数据。 仅字段：没有方法，没有可见性修饰符，没有继承。

接口 — 具有 Self 类型的抽象数据类型。 这些是类型类，而不是 OO 接口：它们编译为受约束的泛型和具体结构成员，从不装箱或虚拟分派。

库 - 自由函数，可以在第一个参数上使用点语法进行调用。 不带参数的函数像属性一样被调用。

针对接口编写一次函数，每个实现类型都会获取它：

Lerp(a: IVectorLike, b: IVectorLike, t: Number): IVectorLike
    => a.ZipComponents(b, (a1, b1) => a1.Lerp(b1, t));

向量、点、颜色、角度、大小——任何类似向量的东西——现在都可以进行插值，代码直接标记到每种类型中。 签名中的接口成为推断的通用约束；当您需要更精细的控制（类型可能不同的参数）时，可以使用显式类型变量：

Zip(xs: IArray<$T1>, ys: IArray<$T2>, f: Function2<$T1, $T2, $T3>): IArray<$T3>;

一些便利设施很重要：

  • 元组在结构上构造任何类型：(t.Cos, t.Sin) 构造一个 Point2D。
  • 以类型命名的函数定义转换和隐式转换： Point3D(v: Vector3): Point3D => ...
  • 运算符来自众所周知的函数名称：define Add、get +。
  • 数组字面量：[x.A, x.B, x.C]。

编译器产生什么

C# 后端发出为性能和互操作而构建的值类型：

[StructLayout(LayoutKind.Sequential, Pack = 1)]
public partial struct Vector3 : IVector<Vector3>
{
    [MethodImpl(AggressiveInlining)]
    public static implicit operator Vector3((Number, Number, Number) value) => ...
    [MethodImpl(AggressiveInlining)]
    public Vector3 Lerp(Vector3 b, Number t) => ...
    // ~340 public members, generated from a 3-field declaration
}

接口通用函数被单态化为直接的、积极内联的成员——.NET 上的 Rust 编译模型。 结构具有确定性的内存布局，被声明为部分的，因此手写代码可以扩展它们，并与 System.Numerics（核心向量和矩阵类型包装，包括 SIMD）进行互操作。 性能可与编写良好的 C# 相媲美，并且计划使用柏拉图级优化器来弥补剩余的差距。

为什么是柏拉图

Plato 是在 Ara 3D 开发的。 我们跨多种语言和平台进行计算几何，并为每种语言和平台重写相同的高性能数学库 - 然后保持副本同步 - 对于小公司来说成本太高。 现有的语言没有提供简单性、抽象性和性能的正确组合，因此我们构建了一种语言：几何学的单一事实来源，可以确定性地翻译到需要运行的任何地方。

限制是重点。 没有变异，没有这个，没有可见性规则，没有虚拟调度，没有异常，没有反射。 每一次删除都是使重定向变得可信的原因——大多数转译器都死于“源语言的哪个子集实际移植”，而柏拉图从一开始就从未承认不可移植的结构。 相同的限制使得每个函数都可以轻松测试并且可以安全地并行化。

哪里闪光，哪里不闪光

Plato 是为小值类型上的纯计算内核而构建的：向量和矩阵代数、参数曲线和曲面、有符号距离场、边界和间隔、颜色空间、变换、网格、程序生成。 plato-src 中的标准库读起来非常接近它所实现的数学——曲线定义是他们引用的教科书公式中的一行。

它故意不是一种通用语言。 没有字符串可言，没有 I/O，没有突变，没有应用程序状态。 有状态的系统、UI、协议和算法自然是命令式的，属于宿主语言； Plato 是主机调用的层。

它来自哪里

Plato 综合了具有悠久历史的思想：类型类（Haskell、Swift 协议、Rust 特征）、统一函数调用语法（D、Nim）、统一访问原则（Eiffel）以及着色器语言的人体工程学（swizzles、Lerp、组件方面的一切）。 当 .NET 7 的通用数学 (INumber<TSelf>) 独立地收敛到 Plato 编译到的相同自我约束通用接口时，该设计得到了一些外部验证。 它最接近的精神亲戚是拥有域的 DSL，例如 Halide、Futhark 和 Slang：用受限制的纯语言编写一次域的代码，然后将其编译成主机需要的任何内容。

柏拉图和人工智能辅助开发

Plato 是在编码代理成为规范之前设计的，但它的架构几乎正是您为它们设计的。

它适合上下文窗口。 完整的语言和标准库大约有 34K 个令牌。 对于一个目标，生成的 C# 约为 236K。 在 Plato 源上工作的代理可以立即在上下文中保存库的整个语义表面：没有检索，没有部分视图，没有幻觉的 API。 任何主流语言中几乎没有生产库具有此属性。

每个令牌的最大意图。 一份宣言会扩散到数百个具体成员中，涵盖每种实施类型，并最终涉及每个目标。 另一种选择——“在 160 个文件中一致地应用此更改”——是典型的代理故障模式。 柏拉图将最困难的代理任务（全局一致性）变成最简单的任务（编辑一行；决定论完成其余的任务）。

验证得很好。 代理编码是一个生成-检查-修复循环，不可变值上的纯函数是理想的基础：每个函数都是单元测试目标，属性很容易陈述，并且评估是确定性的。 而且由于源代码紧凑、公式化，并内嵌引用其参考文献，因此它还可以作为自己的文档——这是最经济的格式。

随着代理编写世界上越来越多的代码，溢价从易于编写的语言转向易于阅读、验证成本低廉且可安全重新生成的语言。 这就是柏拉图所占据的利基。

编译器管道

.plato 文件通过一系列中间表示变成生成的代码，每个中间表示都由单遍生成。 完整的内部指南是 docs/compiler-pipeline.md；形状是：

source → AST → Symbol graph → Normalize → Constrain → Solve → ⟨elaborate → monomorphize → emit⟩
  • AST (Plato.AST) — 具有源跨度的语法。 运算符、成员访问 (a.b)、UFCS (a.b(c)) 和索引器已在此处降低：a + b 是 Add(a, b)，a.Magnitude 是接收者优先调用。
  • 符号图 (PlatoCompiler/Symbols) — 名称解析为定义、建立范围、到位的名义类型表达式。 呼叫仍然指向整个过载组；表达式类型尚未解决。
  • Normalize (PlatoCompiler/Checking/Normalizer) — 规范化检查器的符号图（去除剩余括号，eta 将一等函数引用扩展为 lambda）并保证一小组不变量。 行为保持和幂等。
  • Constrain (…/ConstraintGenerator) — 双向遍历，为每个表达式分配类型变量并发出相等和重载约束。
  • Solve (…/Solver) — 具有发生检查和延迟提交重载解析的名义统一。 它是彻底的：冲突、不匹配或歧义成为指向有问题表达式的定位诊断，而不是稍后在生成的 C# 中作为错误出现。

最后三遍是新的，目前在影子模式下运行——它们计算每个函数的完整类型、诊断视图，但尚未提供代码生成，因此生产发射器的逐字节输出保持不变。 求解器已经通过自我风格返回细化、隐式转换和通用概念元素推理进行了精确/通用统一、概念（界面）满足；让后端使用完全类型化 IR 的细化是下一个增量。

地位

经过几年的迭代，语言设计趋于稳定。 Plato-to-C# 编译器在日常生产中使用：它生成 Ara 3D SDK 使用的几何库（ara3d-sdk/src/Plato.在 Ara 3D studio monorepo 内部构建时生成）。 诚实的警告：

  • C# 后端是生产环境； TypeScript 和 Rust 后端正在验证概念——它们编译了一个精选的演示库并传递了一个共享的一致性套件（请参阅实时演示），但尚未使用完整的标准库。
  • 编译器在此存储库中独立构建； monorepo 工作室通过子模块/Plato 使用它。
  • 类型错误最终仍然通过 C# 编译器针对生成的代码显现出来，但本机类型检查器前端（规范化 → 约束 → 解决，具有定位诊断）现在在标准库上以影子模式运行；正在将其连接到管道中。 请参阅 docs/compiler-pipeline.md。
  • 可视化数据流语法（PlatoFlow）正在开发中。

该编译器是开源的，与 Parakeet 解析库一起构建。

Demos

多目标几何示例浏览器位于 GitHub Pages（TypeScript · Rust + WASM）上，由 .github/workflows/pages.yml 自动部署。

源代码位于 demos/ 中：一个共享的 Geometry.plato、一个 TypeScript + Three.js 示例浏览器以及一个带有 WebAssembly 演示的 Rust 箱。 要在本地运行它们（Node 20+ 是唯一的要求 - WASM 模块已签入，因此 Rust 演示甚至不需要 Rust 工具链）：

:: TypeScript sample browser — http://localhost:5173
cd demos/typescript/geometry-samples
npm install
npm run dev

:: Rust + WASM sample browser — http://localhost:8873
cd demos/rust/geometry-samples
node web/serve.mjs

请参阅 demos/README.md 进行测试、从 Plato 源重新生成以及如何添加示例。

贡献

适合有积极性和耐心的人的好项目：

  • 标准库的基于属性的测试
  • Plato-to-Plato 优化器（例如，组件级操作的编译时展开）
